CreateCacheRule.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
CreateCacheRule.type: Cache management rule type: * WARMUP: Cache warm-up, preloads data from persistent storage into the RapidFS instance; * EVICTION: Cache eviction, evicts data that has been warmed up in the RapidFS instance
CreateCacheRule.directory: RapidFS directory prefix, default value is /
CreateCacheRule.executeOnCreate: Whether to execute immediately, default is false
